name: Walter Beeler
description: American arranger, composer, conductor, and music educator (1908-1973)

about_quotes.speaker: Nick Brignola
about_quotes.evidence: Walter Beeler called me into the office one day. He said, “You’ve been here for six months and you haven’t showed up to one ensemble. What is your problem?”
about_quotes.doc_title: Nick Brignola interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, July 28, 1997
